description:
Mercy Corps (backdonor: British Council)
This 5-months project aims to strengthen the resilience of 33 local traders and vendors affected by disrupted markets and liquidity shortages through Emergency Business Grants (EBG) (USD 74,250), targeted business training, and support to informal credit networks. IMPACT will conduct an assessment aiming to generate comparable evidence on market functionality specific to vendor characteristics that can directly feed into the EBG programming.
destPlan: Sudan Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
destOrganization: Agency for Technical Cooperation and Development

description:
Mercy Corps (backdonor: ECHO)

With ECHO support,  support the Cash Consortium of Sudan (CCS) led by Mercy Corps with third party monitoring with the purpose of assessing the project outcomes and informing future cash programming. Conduct standalone MPCA activities, providing identification, distribution of cash and follow up on support for 1,744 vulnerable conflict-affected households in White Nile and Khartoum states. Acted will also support 30 Community-Based Organisations (CBO) with 120 Group Cash Transfers (GCTs) in IPC 4 and 5 localities of Sudan.
destPlan: Sudan Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
